title: Amtech K1525 Offset Ring Ratchet Spanner Set (5 Pieces)
features: DURABLE: This 5 piece offset ring ratchet spanner set is made from chrome plated, drop forged steel for durability
IDEAL FOR CONFINED SPACES: The 25° offset design makes these spanners ideal for hard to reach nuts and bolts in confined spaces
10 SIZES: The set includes sizes: 6mm x 8mm, 10mm x 12mm, 11mm x 13mm, 14mm x 17m and 19mm x 21mm
COMPACT FORMAT: Conveniently sized for storage in toolboxes and cabinets
TRADE READY: Suitable for both home users and professional tradespeople
description: From the manufacturer Why Amtech? Amtech has a fantastic range of essential tools for all your gardening requirements. So, keep your outdoor living area looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Amtech K1525 Offset Ring Ratchet Spanner Set Amtech K1525 is ideal for those who need spanners to use in tight and confined spaces, as the 25-degree offset makes the tightening and loosening of nuts and bolts much easier and faster. The chrome-plated ratchet spanner set has 5 different spanners with different sizes. You can use any of the spanners to tighten or loosen nuts and bolts even in the tight spaces using its 25-degree offset structure. The spanner set also has a flip switch that allows for dual movement – reversible ratchet head. Chrome Plated Construction Strong drop forged, and chrome-plated body increases its lifespan and makes this wrench set quite durable. 25-degree offset The spanners are featured with a 25-degree offset. Hence you can use this in confined spaces for easier and faster tightening and loosening. Different Sizes The set has various flexible sizes including, 6x8mm, 10x12mm, 11x13mm, 14x17mm and 19x21mm.
